description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and best practices, gauging the ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners to reflect on their skill depth. The format is multiple‑choice, designed to quickly gauge competence while keeping the experience engaging.
Topics: Modern CSS features, Responsive design, CSS layout techniques, CSS preprocessors, Best practices for styling
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone preparing a technical résumé who wants to benchmark their CSS proficiency.
